mapper.select: SELECT ru.user_id AS userId, r.mode AS gameMode, t.name AS themeName, CONCAT_WS('/', ff.name, fb.name) AS frameworkName, sum(execution_time) AS executionTime, MAX(submitted_at) AS submittedAt FROM submission AS s JOIN room r ON r.id = s.room_id JOIN room_user ru ON ru.room_id = r.id JOIN problem_framework pf ON pf.id = s.problem_framework_id JOIN quest q ON q.id = pf.quest_id JOIN theme t ON t.id = r.theme_id LEFT JOIN framework ff ON ff.id = pf.frontend_id LEFT JOIN framework fb ON fb.id = pf.backend_id WHERE ru.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'SUCCESS' AND s.is_deleted = 'F' GROUP BY s.room_id, ru.position, ff.name, fb.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) = 3 ORDER BY s.submitted_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'SUCCESS' AND s.is_deleted = 'F'
